data_deps.name: proteininvbench
data_deps.description: ProteinInvBench CATH4.2 / CATH4.3 / TS datasets from upstream GitHub release.

install_cmds: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git build-essential || true
pip install pyg_lib torch_scatter torch_sparse torch_cluster torch_spline_conv -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.5.0+cu121.html
pip install pytorch-lightning==1.9.0 omegaconf transformers torcheval biopython tqdm joblib scikit-learn pandas matplotlib biotite==0.37.0 fair-esm torch_geometric

mkdir -p /opt/hf_cache && python -c "from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModel; AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('facebook/esm2_t33_650M_UR50D', cache_dir='/opt/hf_cache'); AutoModel.from_pretrained('facebook/esm2_t33_650M_UR50D', cache_dir='/opt/hf_cache')"
